articles.title: Stop Ranking Ad Channels by Sessions: Use RPS (Revenue Per Session) Instead
articles.description: Google Ads vs. Meta Ads — same budget, which is more efficient? Comparing by sessions gives you the wrong answer. RPS (Revenue Per Session) is the only metric that compares revenue efficiency across ad channels. Formula, GA4 implementation, AOV/CVR relationship, and real channel-comparison numbers.
